title: The Free 30-Day Full Body Reset Challenge Starts May 1
author: Joel Polley
body:
The Free 30-Day Full Body Reset Challenge Starts May 1

High blood pressure. Runaway cortisol. Stubborn blood sugar. Weight that won't budge. Cholesterol numbers your doctor keeps circling in red. Most people treat these like five separate problems — five different pills, five different specialists, five different copays.

They're not five problems. They're one body sending the same signal five different ways: something at the root needs to change.

On May 1, we're launching a free 30-day challenge built around the NEWSTART protocol and the same herbs and whole-food implementations I've been teaching — the things that address multiple conditions at once instead of chasing symptoms one pill at a time.

No credit card. No catch. Just the protocol I'd give family — delivered to your inbox every single day for 30 days, with a community of people doing it alongside you.

What You Get — Free

  • 30 daily protocol emails — one actionable step delivered to your inbox every day
  • Community support — join our Skool group and connect with others doing the reset with you
  • Your health archetype assessment — identify which pattern is driving YOUR numbers
  • The complete 4-week framework — from baseline to doctor conversation

The 4-Week Breakdown

Week 1: Baseline & Awareness
We start by getting clear on YOUR baseline. Your body isn't generic and neither is the fix. You'll track your patterns — blood pressure, energy, sleep, digestion, stress response — and identify what's actually driving your numbers.

Week 2: The NEWSTART Protocol
This is where the reset begins. Nutrition, exercise, water, sunlight, temperance, air, rest, trust — combined with targeted herbs that lower blood pressure, stabilize blood sugar, reduce cortisol, and support healthy cholesterol simultaneously. One protocol, multiple conditions addressed.

Week 3: Lifestyle Integration
The protocol works best when lifestyle supports it. Week 3 focuses on sleep quality, stress resilience, movement patterns, and how to handle real-world stressors without your body going into overdrive.

Week 4: Doctor Conversation
By Week 4, you'll have data. You'll have a protocol that's working. And you'll have the language to have a different conversation with your doctor about what's changed and whether medication adjustments make sense.

Why One Protocol Works for Multiple Conditions

Here's what 20 years in ICU and emergency medicine taught me: the patient with high blood pressure almost always had high blood sugar too. The one with high cortisol was gaining weight they couldn't explain. The one on cholesterol meds had blood pressure creeping up.

These aren't coincidences. They share root causes — inflammation, insulin resistance, chronic stress response, nutritional gaps. When you address the root, multiple numbers move at once. That's what NEWSTART does. That's what the right herbs do. That's what this challenge is built on.

Want More? Upgrade Anytime.

The free challenge gives you everything you need to start. But if you want live coaching and extras, two upgrade options are available at any point during the 30 days:

VIP — $97

  • Everything free, plus:
  • Weekly live group coaching — Mondays at 10pm EST with Joel
  • The Full Body Reset book (digital) — the complete deep-dive guide
  • Direct Q&A during live sessions

Premium — $297

  • Everything VIP, plus:
  • Virtual ticket to Barbara O'Neill LIVE wellness session

Who This Is For

You're a fit if:

  • You're dealing with high blood pressure, high blood sugar, high cortisol, stubborn weight, or high cholesterol — or some combination
  • You're on medication but your numbers still aren't where they should be
  • You're tired of treating symptoms while the root cause goes unaddressed
  • You want a concrete 30-day protocol with real accountability
  • You're ready to invest time in a full body reset

You're probably not a fit if:

  • You have a medical emergency (get to an ER)
  • You're looking for a quick fix without any effort
  • You distrust herbs or natural approaches on principle

Join Free — Starts May 1

Enter your email in the banner at the top of this page to lock in your spot. You'll get a welcome email with your Skool community link and everything you need to be ready on Day 1.

Next cohort starts May 1. The protocol is free. The community is free. Just show up.
